userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored so it persists across sessions.

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so I can see new activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to update notification read state so I can track what I have seen.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications can be marked read or unread.

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications can be filtered by read state.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear read notifications so cleanup stays easy.
acceptanceCriteria: All read notifications can be cleared.
